title: Error semantics for agents
description: Emitted on stderr when JSON errors mode is active (--json, global --output-format json, or effective JSON on scp/tunnel). Not a success payload. Agents MUST use retryable/error_class before re-invoking (Rules Rust retry/backoff).

exit_code.description: Process exit code following sysexits-inspired mapping

message.description: Human-readable error text carried inside the JSON envelope on stderr

remote_exit_code.description: Optional remote shell exit when process exit is EX_GENERAL (1) after non-zero remote command

error_class.description: High-level class: transient (agent may re-invoke with backoff), permanent (fix inputs), cancelled (signal/pipe)

retryable.description: True only when the same argv may succeed after backoff (exit 74 transport/timeout). Never true for auth (77), usage (64), or remote command (1)

suggestion.description: Optional short remediation hint for agents
